ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "main_page_load_time" REAL /* Load time for the main page */,
  "sign_in_page_load_time" REAL /* Load time for the sign-in page */,
  "sign_in_time" REAL /* Time taken to sign in */,
  "total_sign_in_flow_time" REAL /* Total time for the sign-in flow */,
  "search_time" REAL /* Time spent on search */,
  "search_count" INTEGER /* Number of searches performed */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for all requests */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate in percentage */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput in requests per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Total number of logins by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed during the session */,
  "search_queries" INTEGER /* Number of search queries performed during the session */,
  "engagement_actions" INTEGER /* Number of engagement actions (e.g., clicks, likes) during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the view occurred */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page viewed */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Time taken to load the page */,
  "view_order" INTEGER /* Order of the page view within the session */,
  "referer" TEXT /* Previous page (referer) that led to this page view */,
  "exit_page" INTEGER /* Whether this page was the exit page for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the query was made */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* The search query string */,
  "search_time" REAL /* Time taken to perform the search */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "result_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the engagement occurred */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., click, like, share) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_information" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the device was used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "device_pixels" TEXT /* Device pixels (e.g., retina display) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_information_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the location was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the user's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the user's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the user's location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_location_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A/B test */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the A/B test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the A/B test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the A/B test */,
  "variant_a_performance" REAL /* Performance metric for variant A */,
  "variant_b_performance" REAL /* Performance metric for variant B */,
  "winner" TEXT /* The winning variant */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the test results */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_delivery" (
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDN usage entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the CDN was used */,
  "cdn_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the CDN service */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time from the CDN */,
  "data_transfered" REAL /* Amount of data transferred in MB */,
  "cache_hits" INTEGER /* Number of cache hits */,
  "cache_misses" INTEGER /* Number of cache misses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cdn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_delivery_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personalization" (
  "personalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personalization entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the content is personalized */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of personalized content (e.g., product, article) */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personalized content */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for displaying the personalized content */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for displaying the personalized content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personalization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the segment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_users" (
  "segment_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment-user mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the user's membership in the segment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the user's membership in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_users_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funnel_analysis" (
  "funnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funnel entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is going through the funnel */,
  "funnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the conversion funnel */,
  "step" TEXT /* Current step in the funnel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the user's progression through the funnel */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the user's progression through the funnel */,
  "converted" INTEGER /* Whether the user has converted (completed the funnel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funnel_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the predictive model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the predictive model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the predictive model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
